headline: Northrop, Lockheed, Other Defense Stocks Rise as Trump Sparks Iran War Fears
summary: President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran might be over.  “To me, I think it’s over, I don’t want to deal with them anymore,” Trump told reporters at a NATO summit in Ankara on Wednesday, according to the Wall Street Journal.  U.S. Central Command said American forces hit more than 80 targets in a new round of strikes against Iran Tuesday.

headline: What RKLB Stock Does When Markets Panic
summary: Record contracts and mission successes paint a strong picture, but the stock's behavior during market shocks reveals a much steeper risk profile.

raw.headline: What RKLB Stock Does When Markets Panic
